name: report_run_status
short_description: Report reason for staleness of run.
full_help:
report_run_status

Description: 
Report reason for staleness of run.

Syntax: 
report_run_status  [-quiet] [-verbose] <runs>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <runs>      Run whose status needs to report

Categories:

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
